room_d_final_witch: ^Final Witch: A structure capable of surviving inheritance.

c-0:
^MC: What am I?

^Final Witch: You are continuation.

^Final Witch: Not resurrection.

^Final Witch: Not imitation.

^Final Witch: Continuation.

^Final Witch: You are everything that once made up all of me.
c-1: ^Final Witch: I proved a human being can survive death through preserved information.
^Final Witch: memory can exist separately from flesh.
^Final Witch: But humanity cannot survive perfect preservation.
^Final Witch: You have now destroyed all of me.
